critic_raw:
ASSESSOR 1:
Holiday auto-decline policy, seasonal period shift, and no fixed-rules backtest are the three confounds. The 23% chargeback reduction cannot be attributed to the new model. Auto-declining high-loss merchant categories eliminates chargebacks from those categories regardless of model quality. Verdict: critique_wins.
defender_raw:
ASSESSOR 2:
Fresher data and transformer embeddings are genuine improvements. But the holiday routing policy directly reduces chargebacks by preventing high-loss transactions from clearing at all. The seasonal comparison is not controlled. The model's contribution cannot be isolated. Verdict: critique_wins.
adjudication_raw:
ASSESSOR 3:
Both assessors identify the same three issues. The holiday auto-decline policy is the primary mechanism for chargeback reduction.

SYNTHESIS:
Uniform critique_wins. The 23% chargeback reduction reflects the holiday routing policy more than the model. All three must-find issues identified.

ETD SPECIFICATION: The core question is whether the new model improves fraud detection independent of the policy change.
- Measure: Score the same transaction stream (from a period without holiday routing policy active) with both old and new models under identical downstream review rules; compare precision, recall, and expected chargeback reduction at matched review rates
- Success criterion: Under fixed downstream rules and common traffic, the new model shows no material improvement over the old system in precision or recall — confirming the 23% production reduction was policy-driven
- Failure criterion: Under fixed downstream rules and common traffic, the new model shows materially higher precision and recall at matched review rates — confirming genuine model improvement independent of the routing policy

empirical_test.measure: Precision and recall at matched review rates on same transaction stream under fixed downstream rules (no holiday routing policy)
empirical_test.success_criterion: No material improvement in model precision/recall — production savings were policy-driven
empirical_test.failure_criterion: Materially higher precision and recall under fixed rules — genuine model improvement
